titlestmt.titleproper: John F. Kennedy assassination conspiracy collection8086
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-12 18:57:57 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: John F. Kennedy assassination conspiracy collection
did.physdesc: Newspapers, Clippings, Manuscripts, Research material, Publications, Printed Material, Films, Videos
did.abstract: Reports, magazines, newspaper clippings, books, and videos containing analysis of the assassination of President John. F. Kennedy, with emphasis on conspiracy theories about the event.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Reports, magazines, newspaper clippings, books, and videos containing analysis of the assassination of President John. F. Kennedy, with emphasis on conspiracy theories about the event.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Magazines and Newspapers Box 1

emph.ref: Series IV. Audio and Visual Materials

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: John F. Kennedy assassination conspiracy collection, #8086. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.persname: Kennedy, John F. (John Fitzgerald), 1917-1963 -- : Death and burial.

did.unittitle: The Rather Narrative, by Monte Evans
Inside the JFK Conspiracy, by Dan H. Christian
For the Defense: Case against Case Closed, by Connie Kritzberg, Shirley Lester

unittitle.title: Oswald's Closes Friend: the George de Mohrenschildt Story

did.unittitle: Deep Politics II: Essays on Oswald, Mexico, and Cuba, by Peter Dale Scott
Possible Discovery of an Automobile Used in the JFK Conspiracy, by Richard Bartholomew
Eye Witness, by Ed Hoffman and Ron Friedrich
The JFK Assassination Timeline Chart, by Bruce Campbell Adamson
Matrix III, by Vladamar Valerian. 2 parts.
Nomenclature of an Assassination Cabal , by William Torbitt
Questions on the JFK Assassination, by Bertrand Russell
The Fourth Tramp, by Ray and Mary La Fontaine
Cosmic Patriot Files, by "The Committee of 12 to Save the Earth"

unittitle.title: Dr. Guinn, Neutron Activation Analysis, and the Single Bullet Theory

did.unittitle: Larry Flynt Kills JFK Assassination Article; Yet offers $1,000,000 Reward, by Bruce Campbell Adamson
When They Kill A President, by Roger Craig
Mary, Ferrie and the Monkey Virus, by Edward T. Haslam
JFK: The Medical Evidence Reference, by Vincent Michael Palamara
Oswald In New Orleans, by Harold Weisberg
Scrapbook v. 2 clippings, mainly about Oswald
Scrapbook v. 3 clippings about affairs, Oswald and Jackie
Series IV. Audio and Visual Material
Lee Harvey Oswald on Trial (Geraldo Rivera)
Jail Bush and Nixon for the Murder JFK
Beyond JFK: The Question of Conspiracy
Reasonable Doubt: The Single Bullet Theory
Declassified: The Plot to Kill the President
NOVA-Who Shot President Kennedy?; JFK Confession
Image of an Assassination: A New Look at the Zapruder Film
The Murder of JFK: Confession of an Assassin
The Many Faces of Lee Harvey Oswald
The JFK Assassination: The Jim Garrison Tapes
The Men Who Killed Kennedy: The Truth Shall Make You Free
The Trial of Lee Harvey Oswald
Who Killed JFK? Facts, Not Fiction
American Expose: Jack Anderson "Who Murdered JFK"

did.unittitle: Anson, Robert Sam. "They've Killed the President!": The Search for the Murderers of John F. Kennedy, 1975.
Brown, Ray "Tex" and Don Lasseter. Broken Silence, 1966.
Brown, Walt. The JFK Assassination Quiz Book, signed copy, 1995.
Craig, John R. and Philip A. Rogers. The Man on the Grassy Knoll, 1992.
Crenshaw, Charles A. JFK Conspiracy of Silence, 1992.
Davis, John H. The Kennedy Contract, 1993.
Duffy, James R. Conspiracy: Who Killed JFK?, 1992.
Freed, Donald. The Killing of RFK, 1975.
Freed, Donald and Mark Lane. Executive Action, 1973.
Fox, Sylvan. The Unanswered Questions about President Kennedy's Assassination, 1965.
Garrison, Jim. On the Trail of the Assassins, 1988.
Garrison, Jim. A Heritage of Stone, 1970.
Groden, Robert J. and Harrison Edward Livingstone. High Treason, 1990.
Hartogs, Renatus and Lucy Freeman. The Two Assassins, 1976.
Hirsch, Phil. The Kennedy War Heroes, 1962.
Mailer, Norman. The JFK Assassination: The Facts and the Theories, 1992.
Manchester, William. The Death of a President, 1967.
Marchetti, Victor and John D. Marks. CIA and the Cult of Intelligence,1974.
McDonald, Hugh and Robin Moore. LBJ and the JFK Conspiracy, 1978.
McDonald, Hugh. Appointment in Dallas: The Final Solution to the Assassination of JFK, 1975.
McMillan, Priscilla Johnson. Marina and Lee, 1978.
Meagher, Sylvia. Accessories After the Fact, 1976.
Model, F. Peter and Robert Groden. JFK: The Case for Conspiracy, 1976.
Newman, John. Oswald aand the CIA, 2008.
The New York Times. The Witnesses, 1964.
Popkin, Richard H. The Second Oswald, 1966.
Russell, Brian and Charles E. Sellier, Jr. Conspiracy to Kill a President, 1982.
Salisbury, Harrison and The New York Times. Report of the Warren Commission on the Assassination of President Kennedy, 1964
Scheim, David E. Contract on American: The Mafia Murder of President John F. Kennedy, 1988.
Select Committee on Assassins. The Final Assassinations Report, 1979.
Sloan, Bill. The Other Assassin,1992, signed copy.
Southwell, David and Sean Twist. Conspiracy Files, 1999.
Thompson, Josiah. Six Seconds in Dallas: Irrefutable Evidence that Oswald Could Not Have Killed JFK Alone.
Tregaskis, Richard. John F. Kennedy: War Hero, 1962.
Vankin, Jonathan. Conspiracies, Coverups and Crimes, 1992.
Vergith, Theodore S. The Murderous Illusion: An Alternative Reconstruction of the JFK Assassination, 2000.
Weberman, Alan J. and Michael Canfield. Coup D'Etat in America, 1992.
Weisberg, Harold. John F. Kennedy Assassination: Post Mortem, 1976.
Weisberg, Harold. Whitewash IV: JFK Assassination Transcript, 1964.
Weisberg, Harold. Whitewash II: The FBI Secret Service Coverup, 1966. ,
Weisberg, Harold. Photographic Whitewash: Suppressed Kennedy Assassination Pictures, 1976.,
Weisberg, Harold. Whitewash: The Report on the Warren Report,1966.
